channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bins bags dumped, ripped open and strewn over road and footpath, 18th April
item.description:
Someone has dumped their non recyclable black bins bags on the corner of Lennard Road & Parish Lane which the foxes have torn apart and its now strewn over the pavement and road causing a hazard. Please could this be cleaned up asap.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lennard Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: No tax on car, 18th April
item.description:
The car has just been moved from Bideford Road to Sidmouth Road, needs to be removed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidmouth Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sign Alignment, 18th April
item.description:
The cycling route and parking advice signs on this signpost column appear to have been moved and a minor adjustment is requested to realign to face the carriageway.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Mattresses dumped on Shorncliffe Road, 18th April
item.description:
Two mattresses have been dumped on the street on Shorncliffe road opposire the big Tesco. I would be very grateful if you could please arramge removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shorncliffe Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on pavement, 18th April
item.description:
A mattress has been dumped on the street at 3 Tower Mill Road, SE15 6GJ. If you could please remove I would be very grateful. Thank you :-)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tower Mill Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Forest Bikes blocking pavement, 18th April
item.description:
Two Forest bikes have been abandoned on Robert street, blocking the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-3, Robert Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please inspect this manhole cover, 18th April
item.description:
Can this manhole cover be inspected please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hackney Council Food Waste bin not emptied, 18th April
item.description:
The new Hackney council communal food waste bin is not working (people are walking past and putting general waste in it) and it’s not being emptied and the smell is horrendous along the street. Either facilitate regular food waste collections or remove
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mare Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hasting close fire exit side stairwells, 18th April
item.description:
We found the graffiti on staircase wall between the 2nd and 4th stairwells please paint it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Buller Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Zebra Crossing, 18th April
item.description:
The council have replaced the traffic lights with a zebra crossing so now cars and bikes are speeding across and ignoring people crossing which is incredibly dangerous for pedestrians.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Amhurst Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents of 90 Belvedere, 18th April
item.description:
Further mess caused by residents of 90 Belvedere Road. Rubble, shards of glass & now wood with nails spilling out onto the pavement. These reports have been logged with the council. If a child scooters along & trips & falls on the glass or nails they will be seriously hurt & will be advised to claim compensation from the council due to lack of action against the residents there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 90, Belvedere Road, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Under tree at 29/31 Benthal Rd sweepers’sacks left for 6 weeks, 18th April
item.description:
REPORTED REPEATEDLY ON FMS for a month. A bot repeatedly responds to me saying problem is resolved. BUT NOTHING HAPPENS. Sacks are now adorned with drinks cans & turds. Hackney Gazette will be informed in graphic detail if you again fail to act.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Benthal Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeat obstruction of highway with private cones - AVF Construction, 17th April
item.description:
Two cones have been placed on the public carriageway on Lubbock Road, in the same area as our earlier FixMyStreet report: 9243828. This photo was taken at 23:18 on 17 April 2026. The cones are being repeatedly used by the AVF Beechbrook construction site to prevent the lawful use of residents’ parking on the public highway outside their homes. Please investigate, arrange their removal, and take enforcement action against the AVF construction site. If it would assist enforcement, we can ask for CCTV footage showing who placed them there.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lubbock Road, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Accumulated household rubbish and waste outside 10 Kashgar Road, SE18 1HW — attracting rats, 17th April
item.description:
Bags of household rubbish and loose waste have been building up outside the front of 10 Kashgar Road for several months. The waste is not being properly contained or cleared on collection days and continues to accumulate. It is now attracting rats and insects, which have spread to neighbouring properties including my own home. Please could the area be inspected and the waste cleared. I would also be grateful if this could be referred to Environmental Health as a possible statutory nuisance under the Environmental Protection Act 1990, given the impact of vermin on adjoining properties. This property is also the subject of an active HMO investigation by Royal Borough of Greenwich (case ref 2946183). The accumulation of waste appears consistent with overcrowding at the address.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kashgar Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light nor working, 17th April
item.description:
Street lamp off
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mount Ash Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover is loose, making a sound every time a car drives over it, 17th April
item.description:
There’s a manhole cover on the road, which has come loose - every time a vehicle drives over it it makes a loud sound as it moves underneath the wheels. This has started in the past week. It’s right outside the Funeral Directors, on their side of the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 68-72, Honor Oak Park, Honor Oak, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Abandoned green Lime hire bicycle in the pedestrian passageway at the very end of Victor Rd cul de sac, Penge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victor Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle full of mould, 17th April
item.description:
Vehicle has been there for years and is completely full of mould on the interiors. It is abandoned and taking a parking space in an area that is always busy for spaces

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Blenheim Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction
